#ifndef GQA_PAGED_PREFILL_CAUSAL_H32_KV8_D128_PS1_KERNEL_H_
#define GQA_PAGED_PREFILL_CAUSAL_H32_KV8_D128_PS1_KERNEL_H_

#include <cuda_runtime.h>
#include <cstdint>
#include <torch/extension.h>

// Fixed axes
#define GQA_NUM_QO_HEADS 32
#define GQA_NUM_KV_HEADS 8
#define GQA_HEAD_DIM     128
#define GQA_PAGE_SIZE    1
#define GQA_GQA_RATIO    4  // 32/8

void launch_gqa_paged_prefill_causal_h32_kv8_d128_ps1(
    const at::BFloat16* q,                 // [total_q, 32, 128]
    const at::BFloat16* k_cache,           // [num_pages, 1, 8, 128]
    const at::BFloat16* v_cache,           // [num_pages, 1, 8, 128]
    const int32_t* qo_indptr,              // [len_indptr]
    const int32_t* kv_indptr,              // [len_indptr]
    const int32_t* kv_indices,             // [num_kv_indices]
    int32_t len_indptr,
    int32_t total_q,
    int32_t num_pages,
    float sm_scale,
    at::BFloat16* output,                  // [total_q, 32, 128]
    float* lse,                            // [total_q, 32] (log2sumexp)
    cudaStream_t stream);

#endif  // GQA_PAGED_PREFILL_CAUSAL_H32_KV8_D128_PS1_KERNEL_H_
